name: Raytracer — WASM via spawn (real threads)
description: The same multithreaded step-3 raytracer (Rae `spawn` of 4 quadrant workers), compiled to threaded WASM. `spawn` -> pthread_create -> wasi.thread-spawn: the host runs each Rae thread on a Web Worker over one shared memory. Same code as the compiled target, no JS-side band hack.
